segments.text: But concerning the times and the seasons, brethren, you have no need that I should write to you.
For you yourselves know perfectly that the day of the Lord so comes as a thief in the night.
For when they say,
Peace and safety!
segments.speaker: Unbelievers

segments.text: then sudden destruction comes upon them, as labor pains upon a pregnant woman. And they shall not escape.
But you, brethren, are not in darkness, so that this Day should overtake you as a thief.
You are all sons of light and sons of the day. We are not of the night nor of darkness.
Therefore let us not sleep, as others do, but let us watch and be sober.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For those who sleep, sleep at night, and those who get drunk are drunk at night.
But let us who are of the day be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and as a helmet the hope of salvation.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For God did not appoint us to wrath, but to obtain salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ,
who died for us, that whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with Him.
Therefore comfort each other and edify one another, just as you also are doing.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And we urge you, brethren, to recognize those who labor among you, and are over you in the Lord and admonish you,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: and to esteem them very highly in love for their work's sake. Be at peace among yourselves.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now we exhort you, brethren, warn those who are unruly, comfort the fainthearted, uphold the weak, be patient with all.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: See that no one renders evil for evil to anyone, but always pursue what is good both for yourselves and for all.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Rejoice always,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: pray without ceasing,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: in everything give thanks; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not quench the Spirit.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not despise prophecies.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Test all things; hold fast what is good.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Abstain from every form of evil.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now may the God of peace Himself sanctify you completely; and may your whole spirit, soul, and body be preserved blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: He who calls you is faithful, who also will do it.
Brethren, pray for us.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Greet all the brethren with a holy kiss.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: I charge you by the Lord that this epistle be read to all the holy brethren.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.
segments.speaker: Paul
